title: Manager – Corporate Secretarial
metaDescription: Manager – Corporate Secretarial role in Singapore: advise boards, manage client portfolios, and ensure governance and statutory compliance.
description: Join our rapidly expanding team. You will advise the Board, manage client portfolios, and ensure legal compliance in meeting records.
duties: Advise boards and clients on corporate governance and statutory compliance.
Manage a portfolio of clients across the full corporate secretarial spectrum.
Review resolutions, minutes, and statutory filings prepared by the team.
Ensure compliance with the Companies Act, ACRA, and listing requirements where applicable.
Mentor and develop associates and assistant managers.
requirements: 6+ years of corporate secretarial experience, including supervisory roles.
Strong knowledge of the Companies Act and ACRA regulations.
Excellent leadership and client management skills.
remuneration: Remuneration will be commensurate with qualifications and experience.
